REPUBLIC OF PALAU

Membership Contract (Instrument D'Adhesion)

The Government of the Republic of Palau declares that it will adhere to the

Convention concerning the international exposition signed in Paris

November 22, 1928 and modified according to protocol on November 30, 1972 and amendments the 24th of June 1982 and on the 31st of May 1988 in conformation with the conditions of article 3 of protocol and will sincerely fulfill all of the obligations presented in the Convention and
